properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where would I be without Your grace? I'd be lost without Your grace How could I live without Your grace? The life that I have is by Your grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am free, I'm forgiven By Your work at Calvary You gave me a life worth living Now the chains are broken, chains are broken

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am saved by grace Love abounding, mercy found me I am saved by grace, yeah And I have life and it's only by Your grace, oh, oh yeah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's only by Your grace, oh, oh Where would I be without Your grace? I'd be lost without Your grace How could I live without Your grace?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The life that I have is by Your grace I am free, I'm forgiven By Your work at Calvary You gave me a life worth living

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now the chains are broken, chains are broken Chains are broken I am saved by grace Love abounding, mercy found me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So I am saved by grace, oh yeah I have life and it's only by Your grace I am saved by grace Oh, love abounding, mercy found me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I am saved by grace, oh yeah I have life and it's only by Your grace Mercy, the mercy, oh yeah New every morning Amazing, amazing Your grace, Your grace saved me, oh

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Mercy, the mercy New every morning Amazing, amazing Your grace, Your grace saved me, oh
